title: Why 64% of NMN Supplements Contain Zero Active Ingredient
description: Independent lab tests exposed the NMN market. Here is how to spot the real ones in 90 seconds.

title: Omega-3: The One Supplement Almost Everyone Is Taking Wrong
description: Form matters more than dose. Most cheap fish oil fails before it reaches you.

title: Vitamin D3 + K2: The Cheapest Longevity Insurance You Are Not Taking Correctly
description: Most adults are chronically deficient. Here is what the research actually says.

title: Magnesium: The Master Mineral That Everyone's Missing
description: Involved in 300+ enzyme reactions. Most people are deficient and don't know it.

title: Zinc: The Quiet Mineral That Keeps Everything Running
description: Subtle deficiency quietly erodes immunity, testosterone and mental sharpness.

title: Selenium: The Tiny Mineral with Giant Anti-Aging Powers
description: Cofactor in your master antioxidant enzyme. Supports thyroid, immune function and DNA repair.

title: CoQ10: The Spark Plug for Every Cell in Your Body
description: Mitochondrial energy declines after 40. Essential if you take statins. Ubiquinol is the active form.

title: Vitamin C: The Buffered Backbone of Antioxidant Defense
description: Regenerates Vitamin E and glutathione. One of the highest evidence-to-cost ratios in supplements.

title: PQQ: The Mitochondrial Spark That Keeps You Young and Sharp
description: Most supplements improve what you have. PQQ helps you grow new mitochondria.

title: Resveratrol: The Red Wine Molecule That Still Has Real Potential
description: Activates your longevity genes. Mimics caloric restriction. But only works in the right stack - here is what the science actually says.

title: Quercetin: The Swiss Army Knife of Flavonoids
description: Antioxidant, zinc ionophore, senolytic assistant and anti-inflammatory - all in one molecule. One of the most versatile flavonoids in the longevity toolkit.

title: Pterostilbene: The Sleek Cousin of Resveratrol With Extra Staying Power
description: 80% bioavailability vs 20% for resveratrol. 7x longer half-life. Better brain penetration. But there is a catch with LDL - here is the full picture.

title: NR (Nicotinamide Riboside): The NAD+ Precursor With the Longest Track Record
description: NR has 40+ human clinical trials and a 2026 head-to-head study showing 2.3x more NAD+ than NMN at the same dose. The most evidence-backed NAD+ precursor available.

title: Stack Audit: The Supplement Combinations You Can Stop Buying
description: Most people are doubling up on supplements that hit the same targets. ARI breaks down which combinations are redundant - and where to spend your budget instead.

title: Spermidine: The Autophagy Activator That Mimics Fasting
description: Spermidine triggers the same cellular cleanup as fasting. A 2024 Nature study confirmed it is the essential mediator of fasting's longevity effects.

title: Alpha-Lipoic Acid: The Dual-Soluble Antioxidant with Mitochondrial Muscle
description: ALA works in water AND fat - reaching mitochondria and the brain where other antioxidants cannot. A 2025 meta-analysis of 63 RCTs confirms its metabolic benefits.

title: Glycine: The Sweet Amino Acid That Calms, Repairs, and Rebuilds
description: 3g before bed improves sleep from night one. Combined with NAC, it reversed 7 of 9 aging hallmarks in a clinical trial. One of the best-value longevity supplements available.

title: Acetyl-L-Carnitine (ALCAR): The Brain-Boosting Fat Transporter
description: ALCAR crosses the blood-brain barrier and matched antidepressants in a 12-RCT meta-analysis. Strong evidence for neuropathic pain, MCI and fatigue - here is what actually works.
